title: LOTM
description: Adds powers and content from the series Lord of The Mysteries!
body:
This mod adds equipment, powers and creatures from the series Lord Of The Mysteries, such as potions to obtain beyonders powers and a cane to do divination and locate others players, and more soon!

# Warning
This mod is currently in beta so it only includes a few pathways and may contain bugs!
For sneak peeks, bug reports and suggestions you can go to the discord!
Certain pathways may be missing abilities that will be added with later updates!
Structures and traders will also be added in later updates to make obtaining potion recipes easier!

# How To Brew Potions
In survival mode you can kill beyonders who will have a chance to drop the recipe of a random potion, then using the beyonder cauldron block you can brew the potion with the ingredients required! You can then drink the potion to obtain the power of it's sequence!
You need to progress from sequence 9 to 0 by finding potions of all the sequences in your chosen pathway!

# Pathways
Currently the mod includes:
- ☀️ Sun Pathway
- 🐍 Wheel Of Fortune Pathway
- 👑 Black Emperor Pathway
- 🗼 White Tower Pathway
- 💀 Death Pathway (WIP)

Other pathways are also in the mod but they are work in progress!

# Beyonders
Beyonders can spawn around the world who will have a random sequence and will fight if attacked! You can kill them to obtain sequence potions!

# Commands
`/sequence` to set or modify any entity's sequence!
